creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 247988
Repocopy net/openmpi to net/openmpi4 and upgrade

This newer patch:
- repocopies net/openmpi to net/openmpi4
- upgrades net/openmpi4 to 4.1.6
- upgrade net/openmpi to 5.0.1
- ports with USES=mpi:openmpi will automatically depend on one of these ports, according to $ARCH
- special ports with direct dependencies will depend on net/openmpi4.
